segments.title: Banana Bread
steps: Preheat oven to ['temp']{177}. Grease a 9x5-inch loaf pan and set aside.
In a large bowl, whisk together the ['ing']{Overripe medium bananas} and ['ing']{Unsalted butter}. Add the ['ing']{Brown sugar} and ['ing']{Granulated sugar} and whisk to combine.
Add the ['ing']{Tahini} and ['ing']{Large eggs} and whisk until the mixture is fully combined and smooth.
In a separate bowl, combine the ['ing']{All-purpose flour}, ['ing']{Baking soda}, and ['ing']{Salt}.
Fold the dry ingredients into the wet ingredients just until no dry streaks remain. Do not overmix.
Transfer the batter to the prepared loaf pan. Bake for 50 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
Allow the bread to cool in the pan for 15 minutes before transferring it to a wire rack.

segments.title: Tahini Glaze
steps: While the bread cools, make the glaze. In a small saucepan over medium heat, combine the ['ing']{Tahini}, ['ing']{Cream or milk}, ['ing']{Powdered sugar}, and a ['ing']{Salt}.
Whisk vigorously until the mixture is completely smooth and no clumps of sugar remain.
Pour the warm glaze over the slightly cooled bread. Sprinkle with ['ing']{Sesame seeds} if desired.
